# date / table

The **date** type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "date", ... })` — a read-only
`DateCell` that renders the projected value as a relative "Nd ago" label via the
`relative-time` primitive. Invalid or empty values render nothing.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Date field type: data-view table cell (read-only relative-time cell).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "date" → `DateCell`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/relative-time.formatRelativeTime`
